languages.text: {n}Ан-Видо напряженно наблюдает за ликующим юношей. Сдавленные слова едва касаются вашего слуха:{/n} "Да сохранит нас Император и простит нам наши грехи..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Ан-Видо напряженно наблюдает за ликующим юношей. Сдавленные слова едва касаются вашего слуха:{/n} "Да сохранит нас Император и простит нам наши грехи..."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: {n}An-Vido tensely observes the jubilant young man. You can barely hear her stifled words:{/n} "May the Emperor protect us and forgive us..."
languages.original_text: {n}Ан-Видо напряженно наблюдает за ликующим юношей. Сдавленные слова едва касаются вашего слуха:{/n} "Да сохранит нас Император и простит нам наши грехи..."

traits.locale_text: {n}An-Vido tensely observes the jubilant young man. You can barely hear her stifled words:{/n} "May the Emperor protect us and forgive our sins..."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: {n}An-Vido tensely observes the jubilant young man. You can barely hear her stifled words:{/n} "May the Emperor protect us and forgive our sins..."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: {n}An-Vido tensely observes the jubilant young man. You can barely hear her stifled words:{/n} "May the Emperor protect us and forgive us..."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: {n}Gespannt beobachtet An-Vido den jubelnden jungen Mann. Man kann kaum ihre unterdrückten Worte hören:{/n} "Möge der Kaiser uns beschützen und uns verzeihen..."
languages.original_text: {n}An-Vido tensely observes the jubilant young man. You can barely hear her stifled words:{/n} "May the Emperor protect us and forgive us..."

languages.text: {n}An-Vido observe attentivement le jeune homme en liesse. On entend à peine ses paroles étouffées :{/n} "Que l'Empereur nous protège et nous pardonne..."
languages.original_text: {n}An-Vido tensely observes the jubilant young man. You can barely hear her stifled words:{/n} "May the Emperor protect us and forgive us..."

languages.text: {n}安-维多紧张地观察着这位欢欣鼓舞的年轻人。你几乎听不到她哽咽的话语{/n}"愿皇帝陛下保佑我们，宽恕我们......"
languages.original_text: {n}An-Vido tensely observes the jubilant young man. You can barely hear her stifled words:{/n} "May the Emperor protect us and forgive us..."

languages.text: {n}An-Vido observa con tensión al jubiloso joven. Apenas se oyen sus palabras ahogadas:{/n} "Que el Emperador nos proteja y nos perdone...".
languages.original_text: {n}An-Vido tensely observes the jubilant young man. You can barely hear her stifled words:{/n} "May the Emperor protect us and forgive us..."

languages.text: {n}歓喜に沸く若者を緊張して見つめるアンヴィド。彼女の押し殺した言葉がかろうじて聞こえる：{/n}"皇帝が私たちを守り、お許しくださいますように..."
languages.original_text: {n}An-Vido tensely observes the jubilant young man. You can barely hear her stifled words:{/n} "May the Emperor protect us and forgive us..."

languages.text: {n}An-Vido gergin bir şekilde sevinçli genç adamı izliyor. Boğuk boğuk söylediği sözleri zar zor duyabiliyorsunuz:{/n} "İmparator bizi korusun ve affetsin..."
languages.original_text: {n}An-Vido tensely observes the jubilant young man. You can barely hear her stifled words:{/n} "May the Emperor protect us and forgive us..."
